articles.title: Five challenges that confront India Inc converge to raise one big question that resets the bar
articles.description: Indian businesses face five principal challenges, as revealed by an analysis of corporate statements over the past quarter or so. All of them are captured by a single question: how to grow sustainably in a world of constant flux.

articles.title: Amazon launches Echo Dot Max and Echo Studio smart speakers in India
articles.description: Echo Dot Max uses the Amazon’s AZ3 chip while the Echo Studio runs on AZ3 Pro

articles.title: Sperm whale ‘clicks’ have complex patterns similar to human speech
articles.description: Researchers have revealed that sperm whales, which communicate using clicking sounds, also vary the sounds in ways that resemble how humans use vowels

articles.title: Indian researcher names newly discovered galaxy structure after Manipur’s Loktak Lake
articles.description: Dr. Laishram said the idea of naming the structure after Loktak Lake came to him immediately after the discovery

articles.title: ‘Gardens of Delhi’ gives us a glimpse into the hidden green treasures of the capital
articles.description: A new book by Swapna and Madhulika Liddle and Prabhas Roy shares an intimate portrait of Delhi through its many gardens

articles.title: Education in the age of AI: sharpen human faculties like critical thinking, don’t stuff students with facts
articles.description: Education reforms like the National Education Policy and National Curriculum Framework for School Education aim to turn the focus of Indian education from facts to faculties, but implementation has been rather slow. Bloated curricula may do more harm than good in an ever-changing world.

articles.title: India's stalled project rate halves, but recovery at risk from West Asia war
articles.description: India's project stalling rate fell to a 12-year low of 5.5% in FY26, but this execution triumph faces an immediate test as West Asia tensions and sticky inflation threaten to disrupt the recovery.&nbsp;

articles.title: IPL 2026: Sooryavanshi picks length so early — and that’s a sign of the best
articles.description: Footwork, balance, bat speed, fitness, temperament are all secondary. Picking length is fundamental. Everything begins there.

articles.title: Why does lightning zigzag? At last, we have an answer to the mystery
articles.description: The molecules and electrons build up to create a short, highly conducting step, which lights up intensely for a millionth of a second.

articles.title: How do lightning rods prevent lightning strikes from reaching people?
articles.description: While a lightning strike occurs between a cloud and an object on or near the ground, it takes the path of least resistance, which means it moves towards the closest object with the highest electric potential
